Struck, like the sound of a soundly shut door. I set out through the park full of thickets grown big like trees, and grass and glorious lake-front. On my way to no-place in particular ~~ to the street. It’s lightly misted in this clouded day: fresh, bright.

In the distance: a fuzz










…or it could be exhaust. There are many vehicles about but this seems more specific, not quite the ripple of heat emitted by the warm engine of a tool of motion. These ripples, these rhythmic ripples that have almost got a sound and that most certainly carry a beat; still though, oh-so chaotic. In follow of the knowing, I’m flattened already by a fascination and adjust my step to carry the beat of whatever it is You’re expressing.

From this distance it’s deep








and I’m focused and aware. The rhythmic ripples approaching, with sudden sparkles of colorful vibration swimming through the air ~~ apparently in my direction: almost claw-like but more as nurturing roots of a pale yellow, then of a glistening silver to a deep green that scream”WELCOME!”, from this distance and still the ripples: a more distinct pattern erupting, very vibrant, very true.

At this distance, stopped






by a signal our species has created to manage the motion; there’s still quite a distance quite rapidly diminishing as you remain in approaching, and WOW! I sense that there’s a smile as the ripples manifest themselves as physical. The welcoming root systems complexify stunningly, grasping, approaching toward me and I’m taken, embraced and stopped, lost in wonder at whether you know just what you’re doing. Still, you’re chaos in motion and

from this distance… I go




stumbling into the intersecting street drunk with excitement and wonder, now as a closer pace adjusts that’s different, more immediate and familiar; yes, that is a smile: that’s a white slice in your dark face, your features are forming…

From this distance it’s clear


that you’re floating, as am I, in this thing called a body. Your happy eyes sparkle and giggle and sing while the waves that you emit are embracefull and caring. I’m most truely caught up in the colorfull bouquet of energy that you’re expressing.

At this distance: the catching of gaze then the magnificent rays of your being slip right into me to dance around my soul as we stroll closer to together to knowingly exchange a smile and “Hello!” with well-wishes, rapid at this disappearing distance as we pass, this fast connection lasts then snaps at synapse... . .

. . .but we both turn to follow, quickly reclaiming that space,
and reach out with these bodies to share in passionate embrace.

posts.title: Eleventh Daime
posts.content:
In the three and a half months since the last Daime, the eleventh, my journey has taken me to a place far away from Ayahuasca… this is relative: there’s Aya all around but it has yet to find me again on my journey.  Going into the ceremony that day in June, I knew that this would be the case.  Something told me that it would be the last communion for a while.  

 And while this has been the case,  Aya has not been consumed by me, it has remained with me very potently in spirit.  I think that once you partake in the brew, the brew stays with you.  It’s a daily practice for me to slip into that otherwordly Aya space.  Sometimes I have to look for it, concentrate a bit and other times I’m overtaken by sudden sensations or realizations from that place. 

Daime hymns from the works still pop into my conscious game now and again too.  Sometimes a whole morning will be spent with a certain song, or a melody may creep in while walking about.  It’s a rich and welcome addition to this experience for me.  That and the memories, some of which have been logged here, keep me busy with Mystical Aya Magic through the context in which i’ve explored it.

Recently while engaging with Christian and Cannabis and Mushrooms, the notion of an “Ottawa Valley Aya” came up.  The idea being that Reed Canary Grass could supply the DMT and some other native plant, the MAOI… Perhaps Sweet Gale (?)  Since then, a non-Daime ceremony has been floating around in the visionary part of me.  It’s a pretty comforting vision,  one that may be shared here someday.

What I’m finding interesting right now however, is extensive hot yoga + Cannabis.  This past week, I’ve done eight hours of hot yoga… about nine if you include all the sivasana, in six sessions on four days.  I have enjoyed the results tremendously, both physically (how limber I feel) and psychically (how groovily swooshy-swirly and connected I feel).  A regular practice of at least that much hy+c, I’m certain, will allow deeper, perhaps more thorough connection with the Mystical Aya Magic.

 

…of course, there’s also this snuff I’ve dreamed about too…

posts.title: Vipassana ~ First Course
posts.content:
www.dhamma.org

I first heard of this course while I was on the farm in Victoria where laura and I hooked up in the summer of 2000. Morris, the organic farmer with whom I was apprenticing was going to his first meditation course at the end of the season.

Over the years, I’ve met several folks who’ve taken the course (more than a couple of times) and who have nothing but praise for the Vipassana technique and the experience of learning the technique while secluded by an oath of noble silence for ten days.

And now I know why.

The links provided above will give you a good introduction to the technique and its instruction. In this article, I’m going to focus specifically on my personal experience and impressions.

Firstly, it’s the hardest thing I’ve ever done. I think that the next time I take the course it will be a little easier. I know what to expect with an environment of noble silence now. That was the most difficult part of the experience for me, which I believe says a lot about how attached I am to my ego. It was challenging for me to share close quarters with thirty other men and to not be allowed to communicate with them in any way.

It was the hardest thing I’ve ever done also because I walked away from tobacco the day before the course, going off cold turkey on an addiction that has spanned half my life. As much as it felt through the course like this part was ‘no problem’, there was lots coming up for me on subtle levels the whole time I was there. If I’m still feeling it now, two+ weeks after kicking then the first few days were profound. I didn’t notice psychologically at the time mostly because of the trip I was giving my mind. And because there was absolutely no possible way for me to smoke.

It was the hardest thing I’ve ever done because I’ve got a lot of work to do still. Very humbling to have a good look at myself and to only catch a little glimpse of how much work is left to do to purify the mind. I had been getting the feeling, (though not so much lately because of the absence of Daime in my life), that I was getting closer to liberation. And no doubt I am (as are all of us) but whoa have I ever got a way to go.

There are three important precepts to achieving total liberation; the state of buddha:

1. Don’t do sinful things

2. Do do wholesome things

3. Purify the mind

This somewhat of a mantra for me as I was struggling with being so far away from my family, addictions and general habit patterns. It’s the mind purification, mostly that is the focus of Vipassana. The other two will fall pretty easily into place as the third is practiced and refined.

The Course is structured very specifically around a pretty tight time schedule. The morning bell is at 4am and it’s lights out by 10pm at the latest. There are three mandatory group sittings in the Dhamma hall of an hour each. The rest of the meditation periods are either in the hall or in our rooms at either our or the teacher’s discretion. We receive instruction on technique regularly throughout the course and there is also lots of periods of chanting in pali by the teacher S.N. Goenka. In all for the days, out of 17.5 waking hours, 10.5 hours are spent in meditation and four and a half hours are ‘rest periods’ where we take meals and ‘relax’. There is a video discourse by Mr. Goenka every night that is informative and entertaining too.

The course I attended ran from Oct 17-28 2007

DAY ZERO

Laura and Soma on the ‘last’ leg of our journey to Mission. A Long road trip that began in June and was set to be ending when I returned to the Unit after the meditation. The centre is located about thirty km. outside of Merritt B.C., which is beautifull and pretty high up there. They dropped me into orientation at about two thirty. I was struck with some sadness, excitement and fears about what I was doing. After registering and getting set up in my room, there were orientation meetings and a shared meal before we all take the oath of silence and slip into our respective courses. For the next ten days, aside from in the Dhamma hall, the men and women are segregated.

DAY ONE

After a really rough sleep, I awaken easily by the morning bell. My roommate is an off-the-wall snorer. Like, crank the amp. to eleven kind of snoring. Despite this, It’s comfortable bing wrapped in my shawl in the dim Dhamma hall. It’s pretty cold and almost everyone is present, barely awake and meditating according to instructions given in the previous night.

While walking around the grounds later, it strikes me that it’s not too difficult, meditating but then it strikes me also that I’m not going to see Soma for a long time ( longest ever!) and this brings with it a sadness and I cry in the forest.

The rest of the day is marked in melancholy

DAY TWO

“Another Sleepless night for me
It won’t do no good to call
The police
Always come late if they come at all”
~Tracy Chapman

I couldn’t call the police but worse than that,Noble Silence wouldn’t allow me to talk with Christopher about his snoring. The first part of the meditation moves to a little deeper focus. For the first three days of the course we’re practicing Anapana meditation: a focus on the breath. It’s fascinating to see just how much my mind wanders. We’re encouraged to retain a light tone and to not be frustrated by our minds habit of finding breath just a little too boring. This is no problem for me as I’m easily amused by it.

ALSO HOWEVER
I’m beginning to feel a bit concerned about not having yet made poopies. I notice some coffee in the dining hall and thus begins the incredible and ongoing dialogue (internal and otherwise) about the nature of ‘intoxicant’ as it relelates to what I can see as the only dogmatic excercise within this practice: Sila. In order to purify the mind, one must engage in three practices. Sila, which is morality. Samadhi, which is focus and Panna which is knowledge, or wisdom. All three of these practices are necessary to achieve liberation and all three work together toward achieving that goal.

My most profound experiential experience of all this first Vipassana course was observation of that. The five precepts of sila are: No killing, no stealing, no lying, no inappropriate sexual conduct and no intoxicants.
A little background: When I applied to take the course I was told that in order to be accepted I needed to forgo for two weeks all of the ‘drugs’ that I had listed as having been part of my life. So, on Oct. 3, I smoked my last pipe-full of Cannabis and drank my last cup of coffee. I then endeavored to stop smoking tobacco as much as I could handle it. I managed to cut back seriously to the point where I smoked six on the 16th (Chef MyKLove’s last smoke was 10-16-2007 at aprox 7:00 pm in Kelowna B.C.)

There are reasons for the Sila precepts I know. If you’re living a moral life, then you’re able to more clearly focus the mind. It takes an incredible amount of conflicting mental energy to lie steal or kill. Actions that cause the mind to become wrapped up in a world of distracting chatter. There are some “intoxicants” that do this as well. A few that I’ve experienced are coffee, excessive refined sugar or refined (wheat)flour, LSD, Not having a poo for three days, …

I drank some coffee and my brain went into overdrive.

DAY THREE

Still no poo. I drink more coffee and ask the manager for a stronger laxative. I am provided with some senna pills for bedtime. It feels as if my focus in the Dhamma hall is coming together. Even though I’m thinking a lot about our relationship with the divine and hour our relationship with plants has helped to shape this, I’m also getting to a pretty good focused space where I can catch my minds efforts at wandering even before it gets going. Or very shortly after it does go.

DAY FOUR

The laxative worked wonders. It felt so good to free the body from such toxic sludge. Day four is Vipassana day where we learn the basics of the technique we came here to learn. After three days of anapana, I’m really getting the hang of it and after lunch on day four we are introduced to the technique.

Suddenly, I’m very frustrated and confused. After getting into such a focused place with our breath, we’re asked mow to take that concentrated focus and move it around the body and I just don’t get it. After meeting with the assistant teachers (Bob and Jenny Jeffs who are an incredible and inspiring, if not almost seemingly (frustratingly so at times) aloof) and feeling afraid of failing at this meditation thing, I sleep on it.

DAY FIVE

Or, well I rest and wake up. In the time since going to bed in a room full of snores and the afternoon group meditation, I come to understand the technique. “PHEW!” But despite this success, I’m growing weary about this place. Missing my family and missing talking to people. I’m trying to think of excuses to talk with the teachers or with Josh, the manager of the men’s side but there’s just no credible reason. Practicing tolerance is the only real enlightening option… as heavy as it feels. I want to go home

DAY SIX

“Get me out of here!” I’m feeling pretty miserable. Trying to count down the days. past halfway but it feels like so long away ’till I’m free from this prison. The only things that are pleasant to me in the least are the food and the discourses and the internal dialog. In retrospect I realize now that withdrawal from caffeine could have played a role in how icky i felt on day six.

THE FOOD

Breakfast is always the same. We eat between 6:30 and 7:15 am. It’s buffet style spread of gruel, prunes, dried and fresh fruit, granola, yogurt, toast, milks. A really great way to start the day. Lunch is always different though an assortment of fresh salad items is always available. Sprouts and chickpeas and shredded beats and carrots. My only real complaint about the food is that lunch regularly contained soy (tofu) which I understand to be rather taxing and TOXIC to the system. Lunch is served at eleven a.m. and it’s our last meal of the day. At tea time (5pm) we’re served fruit and tea. I drank warm lemon water and ate an apple every day. This organization of the daily food schedule fits really well into what I’ve learned through “Healing with Whole Foods” by Paul Pitchford, in which a clock of the day’s organ activity states that an enlightened approach to the diet would be to consume one’s last meal of the day before noon. It felt really grounding to eat like this.

DAY SEVEN

“GET ME THE HELL OUT OF HERE!!…OK what can I possibly do to get myself kicked out of this place!…” I was incredibly miserable on day seven for most of the whole day. It was small (but somehow manageable) solace for me to count down the days and moments while looking at the highway on the other side of the valley and dream of some kind of escape. There was peace during solitudinal bathroom moments… and reading the ‘chart’ at the entrance that I’d read three times already today…five times… It was really that bad… I’ve never felt such misery before in my life.

But then at the end of the night something changed. We were told that for the last two ‘hard working’ days of the course, we were to meditate all the time. This suddenly took a lot of pressure off for me.

DAY EIGHT

Armed with this ability and the lack of restriction (we had been told earlier on to NOT meditate outside) and I don’t know what else (coffee again? learning about ones’ self?) I felt such magical and incredible bliss. Overwhelming and beautifully warm and tingly and I cried in the lunchroom… gently and softly to myself this marvelous bliss. And I reminded myself that I should not feel attachment and that “this too shall pass” but it went on as long as it needed and I felt so elated.

DAY NINE

A day of incredible hard work. Good work. I felt like I got a lot done even though my mind was wandering a lot. When I was in vipassana, it felt like I was liberating myself one little molecule at a time and that I was getting there and when I wasn’t in vipassana, when I was daydreaming I was going to some places in memory that are pretty important to my psychological process… That and thought a lot about buddhist philosophy and about how exactly I was to best serve the human race.

DAY TEN

…Is jubilation. It’s loud. It’s crazy and hilarious. We’re released from our vow of noble silence and can speak again. Meditation is almost an afterthought as we’re all so busy getting to know one another after such an intense experience. I managed to get a ride organized for the next day so that my family didn’t have to come all the way back from mission.

DAY ELEVEN

the course ends at seven thirty. We clean up the centre and everyone slowly trickles back out into the real world. Transformed by the work we have accomplished… Truely a magical experience.

posts.title: Happy Juice and Shrooms
posts.content:
Here’s the link.

It’s a discussion board for psilocybin mushrooms and other entheogens.

I tried my own version of the “Gummihuasca” experiment. After having met Eves Provincial Park, just outside of Duncan, I knew that the mushrooms that I’d brought from Toronto had finally found their place It was around this time that I found the above link. I checked the health food store in town and they had bottles of 100% black currant juice. I bought some and it waited in the cupboard for about a month.

I made the date for the ceremony shortly before we moved. The day I chose happened to be kinda cold and almost drizzly-moist. I had a spot of coffee to avert the withdrawal headache and then finished packing my bag. Said bye to the fam and was on my way. The walk to the marvellous old-growth portion of Eve’s park would take about an hour and during that hour, the plan was to acidify myself as much as possible with the black currant juice. As I stepped out the door, I communed with Santa Maria, for a little anchoring comfort.

Eve’s Park is kind-of the foothills to Mt. Richards and so it was a pretty invigorating uphill walk from home. I used the juice as a thirst quencher for the walk (which is a MOST intense method of rehydration). By the time I had consumed 300 or so ml. of the juice, I was feeling an incredible happiness. A perfectly confident assuredness that everything was quite hunky-dory. If MAOI’s are a class of anti-depressant and black currant juice does in fact inhibit monoamine oxide, then I can totaly understand that action as being anti-depressant. I’ve dubbed 100% pure black currant juice as “Happy Juice”

It was when I consumed most of the 300ml, while sitting at the entrance to the park and waiting for Christian and Nicole to bike by on their way to Saltspring Island, that I mixed the juice/mushroom slurry… to let it “steep” for the remainder of the journey… about a half-hour.

C&N didn’t happen by and I was eager to get to the trip spot and so I finished the walk up the hills into the park and the valley of Eve’s Creek. I listened carefully to the vibe as it took me into the woods. There was a surprising amount of snow in the valley. I was very drawn to the trees that first stunned me in this grove. A gigantic Douglas fir: At least six feet in diameter and hundreds of feet tall. It was at the base of this behemoth that I drank the mix.

I waited for a bit and created the intention of discovery and gratitude for the journey. Then I moved down to the valley floor and a massive Cedar that was welcoming me. The sound of the creek was a GaBblEGurBle and the bird-scape sparse and mysterious as the Shrooms began to move their magic around and suddenly I was in tha sacred space…

I spent many minutes letting the visual landscape melt around me and became deeply enthralled with Cedar and its welcoming and protective embrace (a recurring theme through the seven hour journey). I walked around the area and engaged in internal dialog and careful speculation and was told, very clearly early on that I wasn’t going to go to the place I was looking for this time but that I could take care to enjoy the trip and learn from it as I needed.

What I learned is that this method is indeed a way to commune with the Void. I understood in the progression of the trip and the visuals how it could take me there. I was instantly comfortable with the sensations and eager to explore the external experience colliding with the mindscape. Another thing that I learned is to practice patience and I will again find my way to that otherworlfly space like the first time with Daime.

This trip was like an ayahuasca trip. Which is not tremendously different than a mushroom trip in some ways anyways, but in some ways it’s its SO own thing. It’s a little hard for me to describe. There’s a groundedness that exists in Ayahuasca that i would say is different from the “spaciness” of Shrooms. I think that before, I included this as Part of a “structured” Daime ceremony. Perhaps it’s the plant/fungus difference in the chemicals’ host. Any time I burped during the trip, it tasted just like the burps with Daime. It felt so much like home.

I stayed in the Old-Growth grove a couple of hours and then enjoyed a brisk walk back home, with a couple of extended stops, mostly to appreciate Cedar. And water.

I got home and was pooped. There was a fire going and so I sat for a long while and communed with the dry heat. After such a moist day it was such a comfort. After that I had a nap until laura and sOMa came home. Then we ate and quickly I came down with some pretty intense toxemia. I threw up all of dinner before passing out to a solid sleep.

The next day I was in a potent and raw post-Aya-like space. It was such a Joy to be there again. The feeling was of a slightly different nature but generally it was the same. It lasted for several days.

From an exploratory sense, the experiment was a success. My next attempt with it will be with some freshly harvested local mushrooms and the juice. I will also include some grapefruit into the mix as I’ve heard it helps to potentate things.

Now, to design a ceremony…

posts.title: Gardening, Fire-Gods and LSD
posts.content:
Before last night, it had been probably ten years since I last touched acid…LSD. It may well be ten years ’till I try it again, though my experience was far from unpleasant. I’ll explain.

I have a garden to experience this summer! There’s a big plot in the North-East corner of the yard. The area will get some pretty good sun as it stretches higher into the sky. The plot needs a lot of work however. As a born Ontarian, I’m blown away by the idea of gardening in February. I’m experiencing climate-shock!

Its slow going: the plants are moving pretty slowly too. Spontaneously yesterday, I decided to torch some of the debris piled up in the garden. I’m inspired by the presence of Blair, the plant fairy who’s staying with us for a few days. Also by the appearance in the last couple of weeks of what promises to be a great stinging nettle patch growing adjunct to the garden.

Aside from that, I really Love to commune with fire and will do so as much as I can. When we were in Duncan, I had the primitive luxury of a fire every day for the two months we were there… in one of two wood stoves heating the house where we stayed. Since then, I’ve been with four fires in a month and a half.

Much like when communing with water (and air and earth), fire is a study in exploration of chaos. It’s special in that it does it in several different ways. Fire takes pieces of all the other elements and rolls them into its own unique presence. Fire is what allows it all to be going down on our fair planet. And in its chaos, It is a marvelous tool and teacher.

Besides for heating and recreation, I rarely use fire as a debris clean up tool. It was satisfying to put this one into motion, knowing that it would be entertaining as well as usefull.

The kids came out after it had gotten going. We fed the growing blaze with all the grape, grass, blackberry and moss prunings in the huge pile. As evening crept up, sOMa and Sequoia headed inside for mealtime, a tub, other entertainment and ultimately bed. I was left in the chaotic peace of tending to our creation of a roaring hot brush-fire.

It came about as suddenly as the decision to build the fire. After I’d smoked a pipe and finished a beer, I remembered that I had a blotter hit of LSD in my pocket from December that was only getting less and less potent. And seeing as I had nothing else to do but tend to a usefull fire…

I put it in my mouth.

About an hour later, I was on acid again. Not extremely so. But there none the less, playfully embracing the Chaos of the plume of moist smoke from some of the wetter debris. Making precise piles of dry wood and moist debris as the inferno continued. The fire began its wane perhaps about an hour after that and I became locked into a pretty great relation with the chaos of embers that ensued. For probably two hours, but for what at times felt like many more, I stirred the pool of glowing coals and watched the myriad of motion; faces that came about and morphed while I bathed in the drying warmth of the beautifull dying embers.

At one point, I tried to go for a walk down to the lake but got about half-there and had to return to the warmth and comfort of the fire. I’m not sure what time I eventually went inside the house, but once there, I played around with the mirror for a bit and then crashed. Sleep did not come easily but did eventually come. I felt in a pleasant daze today, feeling that my body was given a special workout, even if the mind didn’t let go fully into the void.

I don’t know though if LSD is something I’d like to take me there. There is something of an ominous force about with this chemical that has me feeling that it’s not quite it. After I commune with LSA (from morning glory), a similar compound, I may have a more clear idea.

Untill that happens. I’ll consider, and integrate this fresh experience… and be.

posts.title: Mystic spring……
posts.content:
This is a combination of two somewhat mystic-oriented posts on my ‘other’ blog (dhamma.gaia.org/blog)

Happy Equinox!
What did you do for Equinox? I know it’s kinda late, what with Easter just having passed and all but I really feel inclined to write about the experience of this March Equinox day. It was a pretty special day… it’s been pretty busy since. Happy belated Equinox!

I’ll Start by saying that the Blisstians, who’ve been staying with us for a couple of weeks now, have bought themselfs a Delica. I’m SO excited for them and eager to get one for ourselfs. It’s going to be their home for the rest of the spring into summer as they stay at the OUR Ecovillage in Shawnigan. This in itself is pretty exciting too as it means the’ll be staying close by for a bit longer. Just across the Lake.

They got the van the day before and on that special Equinox day, we awoke and, after a hearty breakkie, we piled in and headed out onto the logging roads… because we could. We found a great little spot that’s part of the Koksilah River Provincial Park and set out to explore the river.

We evacuated the van and began our exploration of the wood quite randomly. I was first out and walked right on in to pee while others meandered about at their own pace. The trees in this part of the park are pretty big. The canopy begins quite high up. It feels quite vast. The Koksilah river provides a constant rush of sound and excitement while slicing through the forest to the ocean. It moves pretty rapidly these days.

sOMa found me getting sticks together for the raft he spoke of building. We observed a little swarm of water striders on smal calm beachy spot of the river. Then sOMa went off by himself for a bit and found the Blisstians a little up river. laura and I followed behind a little, in Love and out in the nature (wink wink! ) and found that Christian was walking in the frigid water, exploring the painfull healing energy.

This sparked discussion about the merits of immersion in frigid waters as a healing exercise. It was mentioned that the key was to stick on dry clothes immediately after and one would become warm. I was very intrigued and while Blair was getting half-naked to wet her feet, I was getting ALL naked to immerse my body.

The water was SO SO COLD on my legs…painfully so. It was about thigh-high where I was exploring. I Shook out all off the heebie-jeebies and plunged straight down into it, head and all, somewhat fetal and I floated for about a second, maybe two then plunged right back up and out and OH MY FG!!! It’s so cold stepping out and to the rocky bank. I shuddered excitedly and so full of adrenaline and rubbed my arms and quickly felt the warm air and it was all really great as I warmed up in the sun over a few minutes.

Christian went next. Right by where I went in he got down on his back, keeping his head above the water and floated for a couple of seconds, squealing and excited as he made his way out.

I went back in again. I stayed down for a little longer than the first. It was more clear the second time. I had time to hear the river and to feel the sting. I found that there was something eerily compelling about staying in the water. It was an innate knowing that I could find the place that I’m looking for with Aya and other plant and fungal allies. It added a dimension of bliss and glee to the experience that went beyond the simple challenging of bodily limitations. Felt kinda like I found ‘church’ again.

Well, sOMa went in (but couldn’t immerse fully) then Blair and after, laura, beautifull belly and all, both dove full-on into the deep spot. And each quickly ran from the water, brimming with sacred excitement. A complete and brilliant communion…

…presque.

…As we were making our way back, Blair stopped with Sequoia for a sip…Koksilah tastes really fine!…Mystic.

Urtica Mystica

Posted on Apr 4th, 2008 by Entheochef

An immense amount of my current time is being spent with Nettles. Stinging Nettles at that! If I’m not harvesting or processing them, I’m listening to how many different ways I can bring this bounty to the masses. I’m on a pretty serious Nettle mission this year. Last spring sort-of kicked it off but the abundance of Urtica this spring has affirmed it: I’m going to make my living and support my family with Nettles!

Stinging Nettles (Urtica Dioica) are a plant. In the same class as Mint: Magnoliopsida – or Flowering Plant. It grows pretty big and is a common and abundant “weed”. The young shoots look similar to Lemon Balm or Mint or Catnip but a little more aggressive… rigid, angular. They have the highest iron content of any plant and are sooooooooooo delicious. when these young shoots are steamed they taste incredibly sweet. almost like blood. No need to salt or to season in any way. YUMMM! They also are superb as an addition to pesto or in scrambles.

The best thing about Nettles though is that they’re free! If you find a patch, you can tend to it and it will thrive and feed you and your family for years and years. I’m guessing that by this time next year I will be cultivating them. Perhaps even in greenhouses. I’ve been pretty passionate about plants and about Nettles specifically for many years. It feels like I’m being told that it’s time to turn that passion into a comprehensively sustaining passion.

Nettles are pretty all-over the place in bushy and fieldy places. Go find your patch today!! just make sure to be mindfull (even wear gloves until you learn how to grab them) while you’re cutting them. In my opinion it’s worth it to get stung, just to see how it feels. It’s more difficult to intentionally get stung though. It’s a really surprising thing that happens when you accidentally brush up against the plant. Kinda like a little electric shock. Then, depending on how severe the ‘bite’ the affected spot will go through some fascinating sensations for the next several minutes, hours, days. it may even produce a mark or some redness.

Im wondering if we can use the Urtica sting to access mystical realms. It wouldn’t surprise me and it’s certainly food for thought as I explore all things Urtica these days.

I probably talk about Nettles, Cannabis and Fungus forever so deep runs the passion for these magnificent beings.

Nettle – Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/N…
Nettle is the common name for any of between 30-45 species of flowering plants of the genus Urtica in the family Urticaceae, with a cosmopolitan though mainly temperate distribution. They are mostly herbaceous perennial plants, but some are annual and a few are shrubby.

posts.title: We’re Naked!
posts.content:
This morning,
you
roll
Chemtrails – Beck.
Appropriate music to this story

from your sleep-space, reach out with your busy, delicate hand and touch me softly on the shoulder, then the face and I’m certain that I smiled. I awaken happy and filled with the sound of your laughter–your hearty giggles.

Stirring,
still
smiling and watch as the covers fly away and WE’RE NAKED!, it’s morning and a whole day ahead. WE’RE NAKED! and I jump up running to win the race to the toilet but you’re faster–you’ve been awake longer–and I’m sssstill dreaming, on my way to the table by the sink, where there’s a joint, some water and a tapedeck, a lighter and a candle, so I play while waiting for the facilities.

“Don’t you dare light that joint ’till i’m done peeing.”
“Are you almost done peeing?”
“Yeah.”
“I’m lighting it. First toke my turn today Love” …click…fssschhh

“Good morning! Good morning!” It’s the Beatles, they’re making noise as the chillin’ Cannabis flower smoke drifts softly into the air. I hand off the spliff as you leap from the pee-space, grab it with grace and I take my place on the potty with pleasure; release with pleasure the stored liquid of a night full of dreaming. Yeah.

“Yeah… I had a wild dream just now.”
“Prophetic?”
“No, I don’t think so, I don’t know, maybe.”
“Tell me.”
“Let me get off the can first. Can I get a toke?”
“Here, do you want to take a shower?”
“No. Um, I want to sit by the window.”

I hop from the toilet and grab the blanket from the bed on my way to the sliding-doors window,

“What are you doing?”
“Do we have any really dusty powder?”
“…There’s the dust in the bag in the vac in the closet. I’ll get it”

,place the blanket on the heater by the door, turn around and YOU’RE NAKED!, I’M NAKED!, WE’RE NAKED! and I pass you the joint and you hand me the dust and I open the door to the third floor balcony and this sunny Saturday summer morning.

“It’s certainly not the weather of my dream…Shit! where’s the fan”

The fan’s in the closet, I run over and get it, then stop where you’re standing to kiss-kiss you a kiss-kissy-kiss; you kiss-kissy-kiss me right back, put the joint in my mouth then turn on the fan high………

“Yeah.”
“I’m quite cooked. Nice bud!”
“You want this, last tokes?”
“Yeah”

Your strong, strong fingers clasp at the tip of euphoria, I stand by the window, the dust in my hands, you point the fan at me smiling, the dust starts-a-flying! all around all around, outside and in, it covers the Lovers and the room that WE’RE NAKED! in.

“Do you see the way it’s swirling around?”
“Yes.”
“Imagine it to be a cloudy day and there was this swirling around and we didn’t have these walls, only thin air around us, and dust, like this, swirling all about. come, sit on the heater”
“It’s really dusty”
“It’s quite an effective effect.”
“Sure”
“This was the end of the dream; what I woke from just now: Clouds of swirling dust with myself and everyone with whom I’d ever connected–although I couldn’t see them for all the dust–we were all in this dust, being quite comfortably so, on the warm space all around us. It was very peacefull.

“Before that we were at a huge party being thrown in Central Park in New York City celebrating the day of the Apocalypse. Everyone in the park with bands playing on a big stage. A guy came on between sets saying things like ‘Great to be here all together isn’t it?’ and ‘Okay folks we’ve got forty nine minutes to be alive like this’, etc..

“We partied and partied like it was the end of the world, not a care in the world, just reverence, REJOICE!! (WE’RE NAKED! and it’s GREAT!!) And the MC came on and told us ‘Two minutes to go!’, we all quietly counted down noticing smoke trails of missiles over the city…. then, masses of swirling dust carried all of us, and everything else away…

In a totally
pleasant
fashion…

We all still hung out and relayed and expressed that ‘Wow this is a pretty weird/interesting sensation!’ and ‘Not at all what I expected.” With lots of ‘Grooovy!’ and ‘Ohhh yeahhhh…….’:

(…sigh)

You turn off the fan, light up a smoke and sit back silently on the pseudo-sofa as the dust settles subtly all around us and WE’RE NAKED and in Love in a filthy room. You’ve got tears on your face but you’re so happy it feels.

“That must have been beautifull”
“Yeah, quite something. Feels a little melancholy now. Perhaps it’s that I’m having cravings for the feeling already. Beautifull is almost vague. I don’t know Love. Yeah.”
“Good dreaming.” You hand me your smoke.
“Good waking up with you.”

You smile, spring from the heater onto the bed, into your robe then right out the door with a thumbs up, no words just a giggle and I’M NAKED and alone with your cigarette, a mess in the pad; with a hot beverage and the whole day with you on the way.

posts.title: Marimba Mystica
posts.content:
I have a pretty Mystical relationship with Marimba. The music affects me in a way that I can only describe as Spiritually Theraputic. When I hear the beautifull melodious beats, I’m transported into a really otherworldly and incredibly emotional place. It’s kinda like a direct line to The Void…

For those who don’t know, Marimba is a percussion instrument a lot like a xylophone… in fact, I don’t know if there is any difference, except that a Marimba, so far as I have seen, is always made of wood.

Music, generally speaking, seems to serve some higher purpose. There is a reason why it is something that is primal and ubiquitous. It’s something that we ALL have intrinsically within us… kinda like breath. We all have a heartbeat and even if we’re not personally adept at any particular instrument, we’ve all got an appreciation for some music or other.

I even find myself in a state of almost perpetual hum when communing with my newborn son. The use of the voice as a melodious tool is of far more importance than the words when the one we’re communicating with has no grasp of the concepts contained in the words.

“It takes a village to raise a child”

I’m learning this more and more, for while we’re all on our own particular and individual spiritual journeys, I’m meeting up with myriad of examples which suggest that this journey is steeped necessarily in community. From communing with Daime as a group to now, engaging in Marimba… An exercise which seems to need community.

I think that that’s part of what makes it so emotional for me. Even without participating in the making of the music, I’m participating in the vibe, or the ‘ceremony’ or the ‘mass’ of energy that is transpiring. And it happens just by being present for the music. As soon as marimba makes its way into my consciousness, it triggers an immediate response and that response is the feeling of security and warmth from Loving cosmic arms that soothingly say:

“You are welcome here. Now let’s DANCE!!!”

And dance I did; so hard that I cut open my feet last night in Duncan at an anniversary celebration for The Community Farm Store, a natural-food haven where we shop. Marimba Muzuva shared their particular gospel with a willing congregation. We prayed and played and hooked up with the ethereal space of one-ness with The Void… At least I did… and it felt like at least a few of the others there hit it too.

And it was just like it always was, only Now, I know more what it is.

I wonder… Was it the rocks that told us about the music? I think I may need another communion with Aya to answer that. Stay tuned….

posts.title: Fatherhood
posts.content:
I’ve been a father since February of 2004; a father of two since August 2008. On this journey that I am creating, fatherhood is by far the most challenging part. Even more challenging than engaging in a relationship; or a partnership. (If you think about it, all social engagements involve a relationship including (especially) raising a child.) Communing with the world involves relating to it through the context of the experience of ourselves.

Through this trip of fatherhood, I’m learning so much about myself. It hasn’t always been pretty.

I’ve fathered two boys. Both times we expected girls and were surprised by a penis and scrotum. I was almost scared when the first was born, so insecure was I with my manhood that I had no clue how I was going to show this little boy how to be a man. I’ve come to realize that the more challenging part is to wade through all my shit to show him how to be a person. A kind and compassionate member of society.

He’s gonna figure out how to be a man all right.   I’ve learned that the world is a pretty lucky place to have me as this child’s manly role-model. I’m a pretty sensitive and caring man. I’ve come to take it as an honor to be his model of manhood as he’s grown into the boy he is today.

Now that I’ve co-created a second boy, it feels like I’ve been given a second chance. I can’t take away all of the shit from my process that I’ve dumped on the first. But I can certainly see how it happened and try to avoid in the second, a lot of the turmoil that I already see our eldest struggling with. It’s an incredible learning experience, as I said. And as it’s happening, I’m growing so much myself.

There is a reason why most of us are wired to procreate and I think it’s for much the same reason that a lot of us go to church or are seeking that divine presence… even if we don’t realize it. A child is an experience that is a reflection of the fractal micro/macro-cosmic dichotomy. It’s probably the truest, most authentic example of such.

If we look at all of the ‘religions’ out there, they all have something to say about sexuality, about appropriate use of such a gift. Unfortunately, certain extremists in the class have gone and used these teachings as an excuse to spread their certain brand of hatred (homophobia is a classic example)… But there is some truth to what is taught. For the mystical miracle of life to be bestowed upon us we need a man and woman to mingle and to create the big bang that is all of us.

It doesn’t happen any other way….

posts.title: “DO YOU WISH THAT WE SHOW UP?”
posts.content:
Whoever transmitted this translated message to you is irrelevant, and should remain anonymous in your mind. It is what you will do with this message which matters!

Each one of you wishes to exercise her/his free will and experience happiness.

These are attributes that were shown to us and to which we now have access. Your free will depends upon the knowledge you have of your own power. Your happiness depends upon the love that you give and receive.

Like all conscious races at this stage of progress, you may feel isolated on your planet. This impression makes you sure of your destiny. Yet, you are at the brink of big upheavals that only a minority is aware of.

It is not our responsibility to modify your future without you choosing it. Consider this message as a worldwide referendum! And your answer as a ballot!

Who are we ?

Neither your scientists nor your religious representatives speak unanimously about the unexplained celestial events that mankind has witnessed for thousands of years. To know the truth, one must face it without the filter of one’s beliefs, however respectable they may be.

A growing number of anonymous researchers of yours are exploring new knowledge paths and are getting very close to reality. Today, your civilisation is flooded with an ocean of information of which only a tiny part, the less upsetting one, is notably diffused.

What in your history seemed ridiculous or improbable has often become possible, then realised, in particular in the last fifty years. Be aware that the future will be even more surprising. You will discover the worst as well as the best.

Like billions others in this galaxy, we are conscious creatures that some name “extra-terrestrials”, even though reality is subtler.

There is no fundamental difference between you and us, save for the experience of certain stages of evolution. Like in any other organised structure, hierarchy exists in our internal relationships. Ours is based upon the wisdom of several races. It is with the approval of this hierarchy that we turn to you.

Like most of you, we are in the quest of the Supreme Being. Therefore we are not gods or lesser gods but virtually your equals in the Cosmic Brotherhood.

Physically, we are somewhat different from you but for most of us humanoid-shaped.

Our existence is a reality but the majority of you does not perceive it yet. We are not mere observations, we are consciences just like you. You fail to apprehend us because we remain invisible to your senses and measure instruments most of the time.

We wish to fill this void at this moment in your history. We made this collective decision but this is not enough. We need yours. Through this message, you become the decision-makers ! You personally.

We have no human representative on Earth who could guide your decision.

Why aren’t we visible ?

At certain stages of evolution, cosmic “humanities” discover new forms of science beyond the apparent control of matter. Structured dematerialisation and materialisation are part of them. This is what your humanity has reached in a few laboratories, in close collaboration with other “extra-terrestrial” creatures at the cost of hazardous compromises that remain purposedly hidden from you by some of your representatives.

Apart from the aerial or spatial objects or phenomena known about by your scientific community, that you call ‘UFOs, there are essentially multidimensional manufactured spaceships that apply these capacities.

Many human beings have been in visual, auditory, tactile or psychic contact with such ships, some of which are under occult powers that “govern” you. The scarcity of your observations is due to the outstanding advantages provided by the dematerialised state of these ships.

By not witnessing them by yourself, you cannot believe in their existence. We fully understand this.

The majority of these observations are made on an individual basis so as to touch the soul and not to modify any organised system. This is deliberate from the races that surround you but for very different reasons and results.

For negative multidimensional beings that play a part in the exercise of power in the shadow of human oligarchy, discretion is motivated by their will to keep their existence and seizure unknown.

For us, discretion is motivated by the respect of the human free will that people can exercise to manage their own affairs so that they can reach technical and spiritual maturity on their own. Humankind’s entrance into the family of galactic civilisations is greatly expected.

We can appear in broad daylight and help you attain this union. We haven’t done it so far, as too few of you have genuinely desired it, because of ignorance, indifference or fear, and because the emergency of the situation did not justify it. Many of those who study our appearances count the lights in the night without lighting the way. Often they think in terms of objects when it is all about conscious beings.

Who are you ?

You are the offspring of many traditions that throughout time have been mutually enriched by each others’ contributions. The same applies to the races at the surface of the Earth. Your goal is to unite in the respect of these roots to accomplish a common project. The appearance of your cultures seems to keep you separated because you substitute it to your deeper being. Shape is now more important than the essence of your subtle nature. For the powers in place, this prevalence of the shape constitutes the ramparts against any form of jeopardy.

You are being called on to overcome shape while still respecting it for its richness and beauty. Understanding the conscience of shape makes us love men in their diversity. Peace does not mean not making war, it consists in becoming what you are in reality: a same Fraternity.

To understand this, the number of solutions within your reach are decreasing. One of them consists in contact with another race that would reflect the image of what you are in reality.

What is your situation ?

Except for rare occasions, our interventions always had very little incidence on your capacity to make collective and individual decisions about your own future. This is motivated by our knowledge of your deep psychological mechanisms.

We reached the conclusion that freedom is built every day as a being becomes aware of himself and of his environment, getting progressively rid of constraints and inertias, whatever they may be. Despite the numerous, brave and willing human consciences, those inertias are artificially maintained for the profit of a growing centralising power.

Until recently, mankind lived a satisfying control of its decisions. But it is losing more and more the control of its own fate because of the growing use of advanced technologies, which lethal consequences on the earthly and human ecosystems become irreversible. You are slowly but surely losing your extraordinary capacity to make life desirable. Your resilience will artificially decrease, independently of your own will. Such technologies exist that affect your body as well as your mind. Such plans are on their way.

This can change as long as you keep this creative power in you, even if it cohabits with the dark intentions of your potential lords. This is the reason why we remain invisible. This individual power is doomed to vanish should a collective reaction of great magnitude not happen. The period to come is that of rupture, whichever it may be.

But should you wait for the last moment to find solutions ? Should you anticipate or undergo pain ?

Your history has never ceased to be marked by encounters between peoples who had to discover one another in conditions that were often conflictual. Conquests almost always happened to the detriment of others. Earth has now become a village where everyone knows everyone else but still conflicts persist and threats of all kinds get worse in duration and intensity.

Although a Human being as an individual, yet having many potential capacities, cannot exercise them with dignity. This is the case for the biggest majority of you for reasons that are essentially geopolitical.

There are several billion of you. The education of your children and your living conditions, as well as the conditions of numerous animals and much plant life are nevertheless under the thumb of a small number of your political, financial, military and religious representatives.

Your thoughts and beliefs are modelled after partisan interests to turn you into slaves while at the same time giving you the feeling that you are in total control of your destiny, which in essence is the reality.

But there is a long way between a wish and a fact when the true rules of the game at hand are unknown. This time, you are not the conqueror. Biasing information is a millenary strategy for human beings. Inducting thoughts, emotions or organisms that do not belong to you via ad hoc technologies is an even older a strategy.

Wonderful opportunities of progress stand close to big subdual and destruction threats. These dangers and opportunities exist now. However, you can only perceive what is being shown to you. The end of natural resources is programmed whereas no long-term collective project has been launched.

Ecosystem exhaustion mechanisms have exceeded irreversible limits. The scarcity of resources and their unfair distribution – resources which entry price will rise day after day – will bring about fratricide fights at a large scale, but also at the very heart of your cities and countrysides.

Hatred grows bigger but so does love. That is what keeps you confident in your ability to find solutions. But the critical mass is insufficient and a sabotage work is cleverly being carried out.

Human behaviours, formed from past habits and trainings, have such an inertia that this perspective leads you to a dead end. You entrust these problems to representatives, whose conscience of common well-being slowly fades away in front of corporatist interests, with those difficulties. They are always debating on the form but rarely on the content.

Just at the moment of action, delays will accumulate to the point when you have to submit rather than choose. This is the reason why, more than ever in your history, your decisions of today will directly and significantly impact your survival of tomorrow.

What event could radically modify this inertia that is typical of any civilisation ? Where will a collective and unifying awareness come from, that will stop this blind rushing ahead ?

Tribes, populations and human nations have always encountered and interacted with one another. Faced with the threats weighing upon the human family, it is perhaps time that a greater interaction occurred.

A great roller wave is on the verge of emerging. It mixes very positive but also very negative aspects.

Who are the “third party” ?

There are two ways to establish a cosmic contact with another civilisation: via its standing representatives or directly with individuals without distinction. The first way entails fights of interests, the second way brings awareness.

The first way was chosen by a group of races motivated by keeping mankind in slavery, thereby controlling Earth resources, the gene pool and human emotional energy.

The second way was chosen by a group of races allied with the cause of the Spirit of service. We have, at our end, subscribed to this disinterested cause and introduced ourselves a few years ago to representatives of the human power who refused our outstretched hand on the pretext of incompatible interests with their strategic vision.

That is why today individuals are to make this choice by themselves without any representative interfering. What we proposed in the past to those whom we believed were in a capacity to contribute to your happiness, we propose it now to … you!

Most of you ignore that non-human creatures took part in the exercise of those centralising powers without them being neither suspected nor accessible to your senses. This is so true that they have almost very subtly taken control. They do not necessarily stand on your material plan, and that is precisely what could make them extremely efficient and frightening in the near future. However, be aware that a large number of your representatives are fighting this danger ! Be aware that not all abductions are made against you. It is difficult to recognize the truth !

How could you under such conditions exercise your free will when it is so much manipulated ? What are you really free of ?

Peace and reunification of your peoples would be a first step toward the harmony with civilisations other than yours.

That is precisely what those who manipulate you behind the scenes want to avoid at all cost because, by dividing, they reign! They also reign over those who govern you. Their strength comes from their capacity to distillate mistrust and fear into you. This considerably harms your very cosmic nature.

This message would be of no interest if these manipulators’ tutorate did not reach its peak and if their misleading and murderous plans did not materialise in a few years from now. Their deadlines are close and mankind will undergo unprecedented torments for the next ten cycles.

To defend yourselves against this aggression that bears no face, you need at least to have enough information that leads to the solution.

As is also the case with humans, resistance exists amongst those dominant races. Here again, appearance will not be enough to tell the dominator from the ally. At your current state of psychism, it is extremely difficult for you to distinguish between them. In addition to your intuition, training will be necessary when the time has come.

Being aware of the priceless value of free will, we are inviting you to an alternative.

What can we offer ?

We can offer you a more holistic vision of the universe and of life, constructive interactions, the experience of fair and fraternal relationships, liberating technical knowledge, eradiction of suffering, controlled exercise of individual powers, the access to new forms of energy and, finally, a better comprehension of consciousness.

We cannot help you overcome your individual and collective fears, or bring you laws that you would not have chosen, work on your own selves, individual and collective effort to build the world you desire, the spirit of quest to new skies.

What would we receive ?

Should you decide that such a contact takes place, we would rejoice over the safeguarding of fraternal equilibrium in this region of the universe, fruitful diplomatic exchanges, and the intense Joy of knowing that you are united to accomplish what you are capable of. The feeling of Joy is strongly sought in the universe for its energy is divine.

What is the question we ask you ?

“DO YOU WISH THAT WE SHOW UP ?”

How to can you answer this question ?

The truth of soul can be read by telepathy. You only need to clearly ask yourself this question and give your answer as clearly, on your own or in a group, as you wish. Being in the heart of a city or in the middle of a desert does not impact the efficiency of your answer, YES or NO, IMMEDIATELY AFTER ASKING THE QUESTION! Just do it as if you were speaking to yourself but thinking about the message.

This is a universal question and these mere few words, put in their context, have a powerful meaning. You should not let hesitation in the way. This is why you should calmly think about it, in all conscience. In order to perfectly associate your answer with the question, it is recommended that you answer right after another reading of this message.

Do not rush to answer. Breathe and let all the power of your own free will penetrate you. Be proud of what you are ! The problems that you may have weaken you. Forget about them for a few minutes to be yourselves. Feel the force that springs up in you. You are in control of yourselves !

A single thought, a single answer can drastically change your near future, in one way as in another.

Your individual decision of asking in your inner self that we show up on your material plan and in broad daylight is precious and essential to us.

Even though you can choose the way that best suits you, rituals are essentially useless. A sincere request made with your heart and your own will will always be perceived by those of us whom it is sent to.

In your own private polling booth of your secret will, you will determine the future.

What is the lever effect ?

This decision should be made by the greatest number among you, even though it might seem like a minority. It is recommended to spread this message, in all envisageable fashions, in as many languages as possible, to those around you, whether or not they seem receptive to this new vision of the future.

Do it using in a humorous tone or derision if that can help you. You can even openly and publicly make fun of it if it makes you feel more comfortable but do not be indifferent for at least you will have exercised your free will.

Forget about the false prophets and the beliefs that have been transmitted to you about us. This request is one of the most intimate that can be asked to you.
Making a decision by yourself, as an individual, is your right as well as your responsibility !

Passivity only leads to the absence of freedom. Similarly, indecision is never efficient. If you really want to cling to your beliefs, which is something that we understand, then say NO. If you do not know what to choose, do not say YES because of mere curiosity. This is not a show, this is real daily life, WE ARE ALIVE ! And living !

Your history has plenty of episodes when determined men and women were able to influence the thread of events in spite of their small number.

Just like a small number is enough to take temporal power on Earth and influence the future of the majority, a small number of you can radically change your fate as an answer to the impotence in face of so much inertia and hurdles ! You can ease the mankind’s birth to Brotherhood.

One of your thinkers once said: “Give me a hand-hold and I’ll raise the Earth”.

Spreading this message will then be the hand-hold to strengthen, we will be the light-years long lever, you will be the craftsmen to … raise the Earth as a consequence of our appearance.

What would be the consequences of a positive decision ?

For us, the immediate consequence of a collective favourable decision would be the materialisation of many ships, in your sky and on Earth.

For you, the direct effect would be the rapid abandoning of many certitudes and beliefs.

A simple conclusive visual contact would have huge repercussions on your future. Much knowledge would be modified forever. The organisation of your societies would be deeply upheaved for ever, in all fields of activity. Power would become individual because you would see for yourself that we are living. Concretely, you would change the scale of your values !

The most important thing for us is that humankind would form a single family in front of this “unknown” we would represent !

Danger would slowly melt away from your homes because you would indirectly force the undesirable ones, those we name the “third party”, to show up and vanish. You would all bear the same name and share the same roots: Mankind !

Later on, peaceful and respectful exchanges would be thus possible if such is your wish. For now, he who is hungry cannot smile, he who is fearful cannot welcome us. We are sad to see men, women and children suffering to such a degree in their flesh and in their hearts when they bear such an inner light.

This light can be your future. Our relationships could be progressive.

Several stages of several years or decades would occur: demonstrative appearance of our ships, physical appearance beside human beings, collaboration in your technical and spiritual evolution, discovery of parts of the galaxy.

Every time, new choices would be offered to you. You would then decide by yourself to cross new stages if you think it necessary to your external and inner well-being. No interference would be decided upon unilaterally. We would leave as soon as you would collectively wish that we do.

Depending upon the speed to spread the message across the world, several weeks, or even several months will be necessary before our “great appearance”, if such is the decision made by the majority of those who will have used their capacity to choose, and if this message receives the necessary support.

The main difference between your daily prayers to entities of a strictly spiritual nature and your current decision is extremely simple :

we are technically equipped to materialise!

Why such a historical dilemma ?

We know that “foreigners” are considered as enemies as long as they embody the “unknown”. In a first stage, the emotion that our appearance will generate will strengthen your relationships on a worldwide scale.

How could you know whether our arrival is the consequence of your collective choice ? For the simple reason that we would have otherwise been already there for a long time at your level of existence ! If we are not there yet, it is because you have not made such a decision explicitely.

Some among you might think that we would make you believe in a deliberate choice of yours so as to legitimate our arrival, though this would not be true. What interest would we have to openly offer you what you haven’t got any access to yet, for the benefit of the greatest number of you ?

How could you be certain that this is not yet another subtle manoeuvre of the “third party” to better enslave you ? Because one always more efficiently fights something that is identified than the contrary. Isn’t the terrorism that corrodes you a blatant example ?

Whatever, you are the sole judge in your own heart and soul ! Whatever your choice, it would be respectable and respected ! In the absence of human representatives who could potentially seduce into error you ignore everything about us as well as from about those who manipulate you without your consent.

In your situation, the precautionary principle that consists in not trying to discover us does no longer prevail. You are already in the Pandora’s box that the “third party” has created around you. Whatever your decision may be you will have to get out of it.

In the face of such a dilemma, one ignorance against another, you need to ask your intuition. Do you want to see us with your own eyes, or simply believe what your thinkers say ? That is the real question!

After thousands of years, one day, this choice was going to be inevitable: choosing between two unknowns.

Why spread such a message among yourselves ?

Translate and spread this message widely. This action will affect your future in an irreversible and historical way at the scale of milleniums, otherwise, it will postpone a new opportunity to choose to several years later, at least one generation, if it can survive.

Not choosing, stands for undergoing other people’s choice. Not informing others stands for running the risk of obtaining a result that is contrary to one’s expectations. Remaining indifferent means giving up one’s free will.

It is all about your future. It is all about your evolution.

It is possible that this invitation does not receive your collective assent and that, because of a lack of information, it will be disregarded. Nevertheless no individual desire goes unheeded in the universe.

Imagine our arrival tomorrow. Thousands of ships. A unique cultural shock in today’s mankind’s history. It will then be too late to regret about not making a choice and spreading the message because this discovery will be irreversible. We do insist that you do not rush into it, but do think about it ! And decide !

The big medias will not be necessarely interested in spreading this message. It is therefore your task, as an anonymous yet an extraordinary thinking and loving being, to transmit it.

You are still the architects of your own fate…

“DO YOU WISH THAT WE SHOW UP ?”

you are free to publish, reproduce and copy this message as you like!
on the contrary, you are invited to do it…

but don’t modify or cut the message, please.

posts.title: Hero
posts.content:
There goes my hero
He’s ordinary

~~Foo Fighters

On June 11, I saved Matt’s life.  It feels weird and I’m not quite sure what to do with it, this feeling I’m experiencing.  It’s unlike any I’ve felt before and it’s not going away too quickly.  It’s like it’s taunting me or something.  Reminding me that I didn’t ask permission and that I seriously got lucky… or did I?

The story.

Laurie and her three boys, Lucas (11), Josh (9) and Matt (7)  stayed with us for a week.  It was nearing the end of their stay and laura was teaching that morning.  I decided to take the troops to one of my favorite Ocean-exploration places: Piper’s Lagoon Park.  It’s a craggy stand of windbeaten old-growth Garry Oak, Fir and Arbutus;  some amazing bluffs, with gorgeous views Howe Sound and the Coast Mountain Range.  Driftwood galore!, tidepools… did I mention the wind?  It’s a fantastic and most-entertaining place to visit. We’ve seen swarms of sea-lions there before and it has been said to be a good spot to see whales.

My goal was to get Osha to sleep and then maybe a little light bouldering with the boys.  Osha was having a hard time falling asleep and I was walking in a little cove in solitude singing to him while the others frolicked about excitedly exploring.

After he finally fell into sleep, I walked out of the cove to Laurie and sOMa, somewhat harried:  “There’s an emergency”, she says “Matt’s stuck on the cliff” says he and we scramble out around the bluff.  Osha’s stumbled back into awake and Laurie’s at tears as we get around to where Matt’s about thirty feet up on the bulbous cliffhead, about ten feet from the top, crying, scared, cruxed.

Josh is up on the cliff too, a little lower, in a place I’ve been before.  Matt’s in a spot I haven’t been to.  Now that Laurie can fully see her youngest son’s predicament, she begins to lose it.  OK.  I pull Osha out of the baby wrap and hand him to her.  “Keep it together Laurie”, I say as I get over to the other side of Josh and scramble up the easy climb quickly, to the top.

I was moving so quickly in my mind.  I was calculating so many unknown variables with this urgent “Matt has to get out of there” current through it all.  I got out of the baby wrap  (It’s a stretchy piece of fabric that I wrap around my body for carrying Osha.  This one was made by a good friend in Vancouver and I’ve been wearing it only for about 10 days at this point.  It’s two lengths of the fabric sewn together)  and tied a loop and knot in one end, threw it down toward Matt ~~the wind took it but that could get worked out later.  I handed the other end to Lucas who was at the top of the cliff, secure and instructed Josh to get off the cliff.

After Josh got to where we were, I went to where he was.  It wasn’t quite good enough to get an idea of how to get Matt out.  I climbed down back to where Laurie, sOMa and Osha were and understood that my sandals were not at all suited for the climb.  I took them ff and made the ascent to Matt’s spot in my stocking feet.  I hesitate when Laurie asks if she should call someone and say that I don’t know what Matt’s dealing with up there.

The climb was challenging for me.   I’m a pretty experienced rock climber and would NEVER have attempted that climb recreationally without a rope and harness.  Now, like before, the continuous thread of “gotta get Matt down” was “gotta get out of this alive”  I remained so very intentful with my movements and with my thoughts and actions.  I realised up there that I couldn’t really direct Matt out of it.  I could scarcely figure out how to get myself out of it.  He was scared and locked up and although he got himself up to there, I have no idea of his skill.

I’m amazed at how smoothly the plan all came together and how easily the delegation happened.  Lucas and Josh made several attempts to throw down the loop of the wrap and finally it got to within tiptoes-reaching-fingertips and I got it “OOF” and then carefully wove it wround Matt’s waist and through is legs and tied it tight and doubled it and…

“I don’t want you to climb up.”  Matt said in one of our exchanges up there.  The whole event lasted about ten minutes, maybe fifteen.  Matt’s level of anxiety ebbed and flowed, as did the breeze.  It seemed to me to be going in slo-mo.  Everything was moving so carefully.  I heard Osha crying and squirming at one point and let Laurie know that she could put him down on the rocks.  I realised that the socks weren’t going to get me any further up the cliff.  I was sweaty~ going through my own anxiety~ and so I took them off and let them fall to the ground below and Matt was so concerned it was funny “Your feet are gonna get scraped!  It’s gonna hurt”  ” You’re gonna lose your socks”.  It was precious and made it feel like our perilous situation was pretty mundane.

I found that the way out of the crux was to go over and down to where Josh had been and then up from there.  A challenging climb for sure.  In the 5-10/11 range at least.  When I got to the top, I so needed water and Josh was willing to go down and get my bottle while I coached Matt, reassuring him that he wouldn’t fall now and that he just had to find holds while we pulled.

I so SO SO hoped that the wrap would hold a 7year old kid.

Matt  protested but persisted and made the climb.  He had some stumbles but was able to hug the rock and find a grip.  I gave the task of holding the wrap to Lucas while I reached down and grabbed Matt’s  fingers .  “Keep coming, you’re not out of this until you’re behind me” and I pulled him over me to safety.

Josh returned with the bottle of water and we all slowly made our way down the path to meet up with Laurie sOMa and Osha.  It all felt in a daze and really swirly and otherworldly.  Not at all unlike the feeling of after communing with Ayahuasca.

I remained in this blissy relief for a while.  We stayed a little while longer at the lagoon and then made ourway back.  Osha didn’t fall back to sleep and that didn’t really matter just then.  It didn’t seem like much really mattered just then and it seemed like it was ALL so urgently important.  And it’s this feeling that has stayed with me for this week.  It’s a really crazy sensation and even that description dosen’t fully capture it.  It’s Mystic.

I am amazed at what I was able to get my body to do in those moments on the bluff.  I am further amazed at how this sense of duty to the situation came out of me.  A realisation that nobody but me was going to do this and so DO IT NOW!.  Another moment to sit back and think… “OF COURSE CALL A RESCUE!”

I feel like I’ve just met a new part of me.  Like there’s someone in me who just took over and did something without asking.  I’m not so sure about it; how i like having this person here.  I like aspects of it.  I’m a  little unsure about others.  Time will tell how we will get along.

For now, for whatever it means, I’m a hero, at least to Matt’s parents.  I’m just glad that I didn’t kill their son.

posts.title: Likin’ the Lichen
posts.content:
Lichen bathes the rock
SPLAT!
Like splotches from some
Cosmic paintbrush
Flung from not too far off…

We sit
On It
While the Lake lakes,
Lapping at it, and Old Mt. Baldy lingers
A moment longer,
Wondering if He should Laugh
And throw another:                       SPLAT!
SPLAT! of texture to the Stone,
Or simply
Leave it alone… 

And go roam

posts.title: Mystic River
posts.content:
Nanaimo river

49.067086,-123.95576

There are many places along the length of the Nanaimo River where people swim. Where LOTS of people swim! This one is called “Bathtub in the Nanaimo River”

At least, That’s what sOMa calls it.

After having been told about it by laura’s hairdresser, and by a couple of other locals, we finally found the river (not that it was hiding) on the hottest weekend of the summer. Drive along Nanaimo River Rd. in the Summer and you’re sure to see several places where many cars line the road. A sure sign that something’s going on!

What’s going on is the !!MOST AMAZING!! river swimming experience I’ve so far seen on Vancouver Island… or EVER!, for that matter. And we’ve only been to this one place on the river… (not true: we stopped briefly at the bridge in Cedar today but elected to not stay… It’s a pretty different river down there near the roads.)

From the road, this spot is a little 10-15 minute hot and dusty hike over some logging road and ATV trails. Then through the woods and down a steep wooded part to the river. And there are people lying and wandering all over the hot rock giants being carved by the river. The place offers several 10-15 ft drops to the water and there is plenty of jumping going on.

Jumping into clear clean refreshing water… cool? barely. This river is so mild: Heated swimming pool temperature. A comparison to my dive into Englishman River on Laura’s Birthday: Burning Cold! It’s amazing, the different qualities imparted upon a river as it carves the landscape it travels.

**~**

We connected easily when first we met. I dropped the stuff and headed right down and sat in the shallow rocky beach. A blessing on such a scorching hot afternoon! After a while I walked in deeper and then plunged. Instantly I opened my eyes. The water is that clean! It almost feels a shame to close them on the way out (ever try to keep them open while emerging from a plunge?)

I should say that I’m not much of a swimmer. I like the water and am quite capable in it, it’s just that my fiery being seems to find immersion in water for any longer than quick dips to be a little chilling. My core temp cools right down and my extremities will start getting a little numb. Not the case here. I can stay in for a while. This water caresses, cleanses and I just can’t get enough.

It’s incredible that for all the cars that were there and the hundreds of people that lined the river for the half-kilometre stretch that we could see, it still seemed secluded. The continuous sound or the rushing rapids as the “Bathtub” drains into the river could have something to do with the feeling. Also, it appears that everyone there is in communion in some way. Almost whether they know it or not: There is a serene and sacred quality to the experience at the river. Every jump or dive off the water-carved sandstone is a prayer; every excited emergence from the crystal pool, a sermon.

Part of me wants to keep it a secret but it’s obviously NOT a secret.

It is sacred, this water. Or maybe it’s the course it carves. I think that’s even why people need to go in all the way down in Cedar. I feel fortunate to have the means to get to the spot we explored (we’re checking in with a different spot tomorrow ) This water, originating, as far as i can see with the maps I’ve got, not too far up from Nanaimo Lakes is still pristine where we swam, not all that far from the headwaters. I would Love to visit that place some day.

I understand now why Nanaimo tap water is so excellent for bathing, as it comes from the same source. I won’t be drinking from the river any time soon though. I don’t know if it has anything to do with how it’s processed but for drinking, Nanaimo tap water really sucks!

That aside, there was a guy panning for gold on the first day we were there. On Sunday, we saw a lot of same people that were there the day before. Today, lots of new folks, many less people and still, the serene water flows. I bet it’s a torrent in the winter/spring. I’m excited to go and commune then too, though swimming may not be an option.

But that’s ok, there’s still lots of summer left.

What a Blessing, this Mystic River.

posts.title: Datura
posts.content:
I hadn’t really given her much thought though the name had come up in the research that I was doing post Daime. I was more concentrating on triptamines and plants, fungi and animals where these mysterious chemicals could be found.

So when Garliq introduced me to his friends in the garden, the name was familiar but I couldn’t place it. Then when he told me that the seeds make you mad, I became curious, remembering where I’d seen the name but not knowing what it was.
